mapper.select: SELECT QUIZ_NO, DIFFICULTY, POINT, QUIZ_QUESTION, OPTION1, OPTION2, OPTION3, OPTION4, QUIZ_ANSWER, QUIZ_EXPLANATION FROM QUIZ WHERE DIFFICULTY = #{difficulty}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO QUIZ_HISTORY ( HISTORY_ID, MEMBER_ID, QUIZ_NO, CORRECT_YN, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_QUIZ_HISTORY_NO.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{quizNo}, #{correctYn}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE POINT_WALLET SET NOW_POINT = NOW_POINT + #{points}, TOTAL_EARNED_POINT = TOTAL_EARNED_POINT + #{points}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT QUIZ_NO, DIFFICULTY, POINT, QUIZ_QUESTION, OPTION1, OPTION2, OPTION3, OPTION4, QUIZ_ANSWER, QUIZ_EXPLANATION FROM QUIZ WHERE QUIZ_NO = #{quizNo}
